value="&lt;table width=&quot;100%&quot; cellpadding=&quot;0&quot; cellspacing=&quot;0&quot; border=&quot;0&quot;&gt;&lt;tr&gt;&lt;td style=&quot;background-color:#3A3A8A;color:white;font-weight:bold;font-size:13px;padding:8px 18px;&quot;&gt;① Software Module Development&lt;/td&gt;&lt;/tr&gt;&lt;tr&gt;&lt;td style=&quot;font-size:11px;padding:8px 18px;line-height:1.7;&quot;&gt;• Iterative development on the module's main branch&lt;br&gt;• Each module is maintained in its own GitHub repository&lt;br&gt;• Modules are encouraged to follow the S-CORE development process from the start&lt;/td&gt;&lt;/tr&gt;&lt;/table&gt;" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=#3A3A8A;fillColor=#EEEEF8;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=0;spacingTop=0;overflow=fill;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=1;arcSize=2;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="40" y="88" width="740" height="106" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="9" value="&lt;table width=&quot;100%&quot; cellpadding=&quot;0&quot; cellspacing=&quot;0&quot; border=&quot;0&quot;&gt;&lt;tr&gt;&lt;td style=&quot;background-color:#1565C0;color:white;font-weight:bold;font-size:13px;padding:8px 18px;&quot;&gt;② Automated Integration Gate (module level)&lt;/td&gt;&lt;/tr&gt;&lt;tr&gt;&lt;td style=&quot;font-size:11px;padding:8px 18px;line-height:1.7;&quot;&gt;• Compilation with gcc and qcc toolchains&lt;br&gt;• Unit test execution&lt;br&gt;• Detailed design and requirements checks&lt;br&gt;• Static and dynamic analysis&lt;br&gt;• Component integration tests&lt;br&gt;• ✔ Release tag is created automatically once all checks pass&lt;/td&gt;&lt;/tr&gt;&lt;/table&gt;" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=#1565C0;fillColor=#E3F0FF;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=0;spacingTop=0;overflow=fill;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=1;arcSize=2;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry border=&quot;0&quot;&gt;&lt;tr&gt;&lt;td style=&quot;background-color:#5D4037;color:white;font-weight:bold;font-size:13px;padding:8px 18px;&quot;&gt;③ PR to Bazel Registry&lt;/td&gt;&lt;/tr&gt;&lt;tr&gt;&lt;td style=&quot;font-size:11px;padding:8px 18px;line-height:1.7;&quot;&gt;• Committer creates a pull request to add the new module version to the Bazel registry&lt;br&gt;• This makes the module a candidate for S-CORE-wide integration&lt;/td&gt;&lt;/tr&gt;&lt;/table&gt;" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=#5D4037;fillColor=#FFF8E1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=0;spacingTop=0;overflow=fill;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=1;arcSize=2;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry border=&quot;0&quot;&gt;&lt;tr&gt;&lt;td style=&quot;background-color:#B34700;color:white;font-weight:bold;font-size:13px;padding:8px 18px;&quot;&gt;④ Manual Reviews&lt;/td&gt;&lt;/tr&gt;&lt;tr&gt;&lt;td style=&quot;font-size:11px;padding:8px 18px;line-height:1.7;&quot;&gt;• Architecture Review Checklist&lt;br&gt;• Requirements Review Checklist&lt;br&gt;• Detailed Design Review Checklist&lt;br&gt;• Safety Analysis&lt;br&gt;• &lt;i&gt;Approvers: Safety Manager · Security Manager · Quality Manager · Project Lead (TL)&lt;/i&gt;&lt;/td&gt;&lt;/tr&gt;&lt;/table&gt;" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=#B34700;fillColor=#FFF3E0;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=0;spacingTop=0;overflow=fill;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=1;arcSize=2;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry Updated&lt;/td&gt;&lt;/tr&gt;&lt;tr&gt;&lt;td style=&quot;font-size:11px;padding:8px 18px;line-height:1.7;&quot;&gt;• PR is approved and merged into the Bazel registry&lt;br&gt;• New module version is now available to all S-CORE projects&lt;/td&gt;&lt;/tr&gt;&lt;/table&gt;" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=#1B5E20;fillColor=#E8F5E9;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=0;spacingTop=0;overflow=fill;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=1;arcSize=2;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry border=&quot;0&quot;&gt;&lt;tr&gt;&lt;td style=&quot;background-color:#5D4037;color:white;font-weight:bold;font-size:13px;padding:8px 18px;&quot;&gt;⑥ PR to Reference Integration&lt;/td&gt;&lt;/tr&gt;&lt;tr&gt;&lt;td style=&quot;font-size:11px;padding:8px 18px;line-height:1.7;&quot;&gt;• Committer creates a PR in the Reference Integration repository&lt;br&gt;• Module is tested together with all other S-CORE modules on reference images&lt;br&gt;• &lt;i&gt;Approver: S-CORE Project Lead (TL)&lt;/i&gt;&lt;/td&gt;&lt;/tr&gt;&lt;/table&gt;" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=#5D4037;fillColor=#FFF8E1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=0;spacingTop=0;overflow=fill;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=1;arcSize=2;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="40" y="952" width="740" height="112" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="14" value="&lt;table width=&quot;100%&quot; cellpadding=&quot;0&quot; cellspacing=&quot;0&quot; level)&lt;/td&gt;&lt;/tr&gt;&lt;tr&gt;&lt;td style=&quot;font-size:11px;padding:8px 18px;line-height:1.7;&quot;&gt;• Feature integration tests executed on reference images (QNX x86, ...)&lt;br&gt;• Module dependencies are taken from the reference integration repository&lt;br&gt;• Validates correct implementation of all feature requirements&lt;/td&gt;&lt;/tr&gt;&lt;/table&gt;" Release&lt;/td&gt;&lt;/tr&gt;&lt;tr&gt;&lt;td style=&quot;font-size:11px;padding:8px 18px;line-height:1.7;&quot;&gt;• Release documentation created by the Project Lead&lt;br&gt;• Sign-off by Safety Manager, Security Manager, and Quality Manager&lt;br&gt;• New S-CORE platform version is published&lt;/td&gt;&lt;/tr&gt;&lt;/table&gt;" svg.text: • Iterative development on the module's main branch
• Each module is maintained in its own GitHub repository
• Modules are encouraged to follow the S-CORE development process from the start
• Compilation with gcc and qcc toolchains
✔ Release tag is created automatically once all checks pass
• Committer creates a pull request to add the new module version to the Bazel registry
• This makes the module a candidate for S-CORE-wide integration
Approvers: Safety Manager · Security Manager · Quality Manager · Project Lead (TL)
• PR is approved and merged into the Bazel registry
• New module version is now available to all S-CORE projects
• Committer creates a PR in the Reference Integration repository
• Module is tested together with all other S-CORE modules on reference images
• Feature integration tests executed on reference images (QNX x86, ...)
• Module dependencies are taken from the reference integration repository
• Validates correct implementation of all feature requirements
• Release documentation created by the Project Lead
• Sign-off by Safety Manager, Security Manager, and Quality Manager
• New S-CORE platform version is published
